title: customize automated notifications to a slack channel
excerpt:

posts.author: BrynMacKinnon (Bryn MacKinnon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the ability to send slack notifications to a private slack channel, but only being able to use existing automation recipes is preventing my company from getting the right kind of notifications.

I’d love to customize slack automations the same way we can customize monday.com automations.

Give this request a vote if you feel the same!
